task: Help me find a list of school activity events in New York for this month.
graderReasoning: The agent ultimately reached the correct Eventbrite results page for school activity events in New York (`https://www.eventbrite.com/d/ny--new-york/school-activity/`) and applied the `This month` date filter, evidenced by the page heading changing to `School activity Events and Things to do in New York, NY this month` and the filter tag `1 filter applied This month`. It then extracted multiple event titles, dates, locations, prices, and URLs directly from the filtered results page. The final response lists events that are supported by the extracted card text and links from the page. Although the agent initially struggled with San Francisco results and inferred the New York URL manually, the final outcome satisfies the task: a list of school activity events in New York for this month.

action_history: Opening Eventbrite: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.eventbrite.com/');
Opening New York events: await page.locator('e250').click();
Entering search terms for New York: await page.locator('e4').fill('school activity');
Entering search terms for New York: await page.locator('e5').fill('New York');
Opening New York school activity search: await openTab('https://www.eventbrite.com/d/ny--new-york/school-activity/');
Filtering to this month: await page.locator('e315').click();
